purpose: External series merged into build/data/cm_panel/cm_weight_panel_full.parquet for the FULL-PANEL (22-quarter) Converse-Mallucci F3 weight regression power rebuild. Same series identifiers/publishers as build/contracts/cm_sources.json, fetched over the FULL 2019q3-2024q4 span.
reproduce_check_vs_prior_8q_contract: Every series' 8 overlapping-quarter values reproduce build/contracts/cm_sources.json to float precision (GPRC/VIX/dollar/oil |diff|<5e-11; relative_returns |diff|<3e-7, Yahoo adjclose rounding). Confirms the aggregation logic is identical, applied over the full span.

GPRC_China.name: Caldara-Iacoviello country-specific Geopolitical Risk index, China
GPRC_China.SOURCE: Caldara & Iacoviello (2022) AER 112(4); data_gpr_export.xls col GPRC_CHN, fetched 2026-07-01 (2707456 bytes).

relative_returns.construction: MCHI adj-close TR quarterly return MINUS ACWX adj-close TR quarterly return; quarter return = adjclose_last/adjclose_first-1.
relative_returns.coverage: all 22 quarters non-null; MCHI n=1414 ACWX n=1414 daily obs 2019-06-03..2025-01-14, adjclose present
relative_returns.LIMITATIONS: Same PROXY caveats as cm_sources.json (MCHI is MSCI-China equity ETF; ACWX ACWI-ex-US; both USD TR ETFs, FX embedded). Regression also run WITHOUT relret.
relative_returns.SOURCE: Yahoo Finance v8 chart API, MCHI & ACWX adjusted close, fetched 2026-07-01.

weight_panel_construction.w_definition: w_{f,t} = (CN-nationality haven USD value held by fund f at t) / (fund f total haven USD value at t); CN-nationality = parent_nationality=='CN' (R1-R4 tag). holder = cik|series_id (series_id null -> 'None'). Keep tot_haven>0. Built directly from CURRENCY_VALUE, which is USD-native (see currency_value_is_usd grounding) -> NO FX conversion. Definition IDENTICAL to prior; the ONLY change vs the earlier draft is removing an erroneous FX multiply (a bug fix).
weight_panel_construction.w_alt_definition: w_ALT_{f,t} = CN-nationality haven USD / tot_foreign_usd, tot_foreign = sum of CURRENCY_VALUE (USD) over foreign rows (CN-RESIDENT + haven). No FX.

currency_value_is_usd.finding: N-PORT FUND_REPORTED_HOLDING.CURRENCY_VALUE is ALREADY denominated in USD (valUSD). CURRENCY_CODE is only the instrument's native-denomination metadata; the reported VALUE is USD. Therefore w needs NO currency conversion.
currency_value_is_usd.grounding_internal_consistency_test: N-PORT PERCENTAGE = holding value as % of the fund's USD net assets, so implied_net_assets = currency_value/(percentage/100). Grouping the 8-quarter nationality panel by (accession, currency_code), the WITHIN-fund ratio of implied net assets across currencies vs USD is EXACTLY 1.0000 (p25=p50=p75): CNY/USD=1.000 (n=5487 funds), HKD/USD=1.000 (n=10770), TWD/USD=1.000 (n=2193). If CURRENCY_VALUE were native currency these ratios would be ~7.0 / ~7.8 / ~30.0. They are 1.000, from the filer's own numbers (no memory, no external source). Confirms CURRENCY_VALUE = USD.
currency_value_is_usd.correction: The earlier draft (and the prior committed 8-quarter pass) multiplied already-USD values by an FX rate, which CORRUPTED w (measured: it shifted mean w from the true 0.109 to 0.175). This contract's earlier FX-INCOMPLETE claim is WITHDRAWN: there was never an FX gap; the 14 new quarters need no currency_code.

weight_panel_construction.populated_all_22_quarters: cn_haven_raw and tot_haven_raw (direct CURRENCY_VALUE = USD sums) are populated for ALL 22 quarters; 104,306 non-null w cells (~4,600-4,900/quarter over tot_haven>0). w-based specs run at G=22.

w_alt_coverage_gap_14_new_quarters.field: w_alt (foreign-denominator weight) for the 14 NEW quarters
w_alt_coverage_gap_14_new_quarters.status: INCOMPLETE (genuine coverage gap, UNRELATED to FX)
w_alt_coverage_gap_14_new_quarters.reason: The foreign denominator (CN-RESIDENT + haven) requires CN-resident holdings, which build_fullpanel_haven.finalize_haven filtered out before persisting the 14 new quarters (they exist only in the 8-quarter us_china_nationality_panel.parquet). w_ALT specs therefore run at G=8. This is a real coverage limit of the provided input, recorded and not substituted; it does NOT affect the 6 primary w-based specs, which run at G=22.
w_alt_coverage_gap_14_new_quarters.rule_applied: Task instruction: 'if any is unfetchable, record INCOMPLETE - do not substitute.' w_ALT for the 14 new quarters is recorded INCOMPLETE; not substituted.

weight_panel_construction.dropped_cells: 1,114 fund-quarter cells across the 22 quarters have tot_haven<=0 and are dropped from w (w_fx_status='DROPPED_TOT_HAVEN_LE_0'), same denominator>0 rule as the prior spec.
